subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Tokyo | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-5085
body: Intelligence from Tokyo indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the meeting banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-5085. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
